caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard is recording in a studio against a dark grey, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small black logo that reads "Sleep paralysis". A large silver condenser microphone on a black shock mount is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing. He maintains a steady gaze toward someone or something off-camera to his right. The camera remains static, focusing on his upper torso and head, capturing the subtle movements of his jaw and lips as he continues his conversation.
